title: Dad Energy Meets Red Flags
description: 49-year-old lawyer from Houston slowly realizes he's flirting with someone his daughter's age and decides that's fine actually.

messages.Stranger: Hey, what's your name?
I'm Richard, nice to meet you Ava
How old are you?
I'm a lot older than [ADDRESS_REMOVED], haha. Don't want to lie to you about that.
I'm 49, sure you'll understand me being a little cautious.
Likewise. Where are you from?
Seriously? Small world, I'm in Houston.
Haha, what are the odds?
What brings you here?
First time here, really. Abroad for work with some time to spare.
I'm from Houston, but currently in the UK. Back home in a week.
I'm not complaining.
Apart from this site being full of desperate boys your age, all is good.
Sure you don't mind talking to a man who turns 50 next week? Just making sure.
Correct.
Are you in college?
What do you study?
Haha, surprise me.
How does corporate law sound to you, then? I'm a lawyer in that field.
Yes I am. Must sound boring to a girl your lage, haha
My youngest daughter studies business and she likes it.
I have three daughters.
Correct!
They're 18, 19 and 23
Yes they are, haha. How old is your dad?
About my age too then. Even younger.
Haha, where did I say that?
Hahaha. Well I must admit it does feel a little wrong talking to you considering my daughters' age.
But I don't mind. Do you?
Good girl.
